name: P90 | 困兽之斗
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. A brown and tan hydrographic tiger pattern has been applied over a black base. Anywhere but here
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把武器带有棕色的老虎图案，搭配上黑色底色。 拼尽一切想逃离，却发现无能为力。
